titleStmt.title: SII 40.356: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 356. (A.R. No. B. 16 of 1934.) Tiruvāy-ppādi (hamlet of Ponnēri), Ponneri Taluk, Chingleput District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: On a stone set up near the dhvajastambha in the Kari-Kṛishṇa-Perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1688, Vyaya, Chaitra, śu. 15.

States that this chakra-stone set up to mark the village Ālāḍu-Vairamaṅgalam which had been given as the śrōtriyaṁ for the conduct of worship in the temple of Kariya-Kṛishṇasvāmi at Tiruvāyppāḍi in Ponnēri. Ponnēri was situated in the Jāgīr-sīma granted to the English Company (East India Company) in the Subāh of Navābu Shirajid-daula.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakābdaḥ 1688 yiṁṭi celle vya
ya nāma saṁvvatsaraṁ caitra śudda 15
yiṣuvaṁṭṭi puṁṇyadinamaṁddu śrī
madakhilāṁḍḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍḍa
nāyakulaina poṁnneri tiruvā
yi pāḍilōnu Araṇinadi tīra
dakṣiṇa bṛṁddāvanānivāsulai
na śrīkariyakṛṣṇasvāmi saṁnnidhini
nityōtsavādi kaiṁkaryamulaku
nabā(vā)bu ṣirājiddaulā subā
lānu yiṁgilīsu kuṁpinivāri
kiyiccina jāgīru śīmalōnu
poṁnneri śīma rājaśrī divāṇa
puvāruṁnnu Aśēṣa vidva
mahājanālu kanupāmuda
laina nāluvāru kānukoyi
dēśamukhisthaḷa kararṇaṁ pāḷegāṁ
ḍluṁnnu munupu Ālāḍu vai
ramaṁggala śrotriyamu
gā naḍipistū vastuṁnnāru ga
nka cakraśilāśāsanaṁ yiṁddu
ku yevaru vighātaṁ cestu
nnārō vāru gaṁggātīrama
ṁdu gōsaṁhvāraṁ cēśina pā
pānapōgalavāru śrīrāma Built
Digital edition of SII 40.356 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
